title: KITTENTHEIII's VR MODPACK
description: A simple modpack that will make your VR experience better.
body:
# 📦 About

KITTENTHEIII's VR MODPACK is a lightweight, performance-friendly VR experience built around Vivecraft, designed to enhance immersion without sacrificing FPS. Featuring immersive animations, visual upgrades, and essential quality-of-life improvements, this pack is perfect for those who want a smooth, engaging VR Minecraft experience right out of the box.

# 🔧 Key Features & Mods

- 🎮 Vivecraft – Full VR integration for Minecraft Java Edition

- 💃 Fresh Animations – Revamps vanilla mobs with smoother, more expressive animations

- ⚡ Sodium – Boosts FPS and performance with cutting-edge optimization

# ❓ FAQ
Q: Can I play this modpack without a VR headset?
A: Yes, by disabling VR mode in the main menu. However, this pack is specifically designed for VR—for the best experience, use a compatible VR headset.

Q: How can I improve performance in VR?
A: Here are some quick tips:

Allocate 6–8GB of RAM (8GB recommended)

Lower shader quality or disable shaders altogether

Experiment with different shader packs for best FPS

Close background apps to free up system resources

Q: How do I activate VR mode?
A:

Launch the game

From the main menu, click the button labeled “VR: OFF” to enable VR

Ensure your VR headset is connected and ready

Put on your headset and dive in!

# 💻 System Recommendations

✅ RAM: 6GB minimum (8GB+ recommended)

✅ VR Headset: Compatible with Vivecraft (e.g., Oculus, Valve Index, HTC Vive)

✅ Performance Tip: If you’re still experiencing lag with low shader settings, try running the pack without shaders for the smoothest gameplay
